afterSnapshot.name: getWeather

200.description: Weather data with current conditions and hourly forecast

schema.summary: Get weather data for a position

context.userMessage: Approved. Go ahead with the plan.

rationale: API endpoint for fetching weather data at a given position. Used by the client-side map to display conditions.
implementation: Extracts lat/lon from query params, validates them, then delegates to fetchWeather function. Returns JSON with current + hourly forecast data in nautical/metric units.
